_comment: Parser regression for the if-condition fix: a leading ( in an if condition must parse as an ordinary parenthesised primary (full infix chain), not be grabbed as the whole condition. Scoped to lexer+parser — the parser.snapshot IS the regression guard (the IfExpr cond is the full BinaryExpr). The downstream bytecode emit has a known --parallel snapshot non-determinism (see array_contains), irrelevant to this parser test.
